chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 98 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 02.06.2025 Mr. Muhammad Rafique Rajput, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Manzoor Hussain on behalf of SSP Sukkur, Inspector Ahmed Ali Halepoto, SHO Police Station Salehpat and SIP Nizamuddin Chachar of Police Station Cantonment..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Badaruddin Indhar, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.8, while statements on behalf of respondents No.2, 4 and 5 have been filed, which are taken on record. Learned AAG Sindh submits that the official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law. Perusal of the petition reveals that the dispute between the parties primarily pertains to a monetary transaction. In this regard, the private parties are at liberty to approach the appropriate forum for redressal of their grievance, in accordance with law. Insofar as the allegation of harassment is concerned, the official respondents have submitted statements affirming that they have neither harassed the petitioner nor do they intend to do so. Accordingly, the respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
